_comment: EDGE / Procedure A. SD-JWT-VC selective disclosure (Layer 1 D6): the disclosed presentation withholds principalDID and capabilities[].jurisdictions. This is the DISCLOSED-PRESENTATION shape, NOT the issued VC — the agent-credential schema models the issued VC (principalDID required), so this fixture is xfail-on-schema (JC-F2 / design doc §10). The verifier still ACCEPTs: the disclosed set is sufficient for standing. Expected ACCEPT mode=GOV.
